objectives: Deep performance analysis of MX20022 runtime with file:line references
important_facts: std::sync::RwLock in main.rs reload_status (accessed from async)
Postgres pool_size config exists but never applied
RocksDB full table scan on every query/find
TCP outbound opens new connection per send

iteration.summary: Comprehensive performance audit with concrete file:line references across engine, store backends, channels, and participants. 18 findings categorized as CRITICAL/RECOMMEND/SUGGEST. Top concerns: std::sync locks in async code, ignored pool config, missing DB indexes, full-scan queries, excessive payload cloning, and blocking I/O in async context.
next_actions: Implement fixes if requested, starting with CRITICAL items
